front: Minha esposa trabalha ensinando português em uma plataforma online.
pronunciation: MEENG-yah ees-POH-zah trah-BAH-lya eehn-see-NAHN-doo poor-too-GHEHS ahyng OO-mah plah-tah-FOHR-mah online.
back: My wife works teaching Portuguese on an online platform.
context: Describing a spouse's remote teaching profession using 'plataforma online'.

front: Como instrutor de idiomas, é preciso ter muita paciência.
pronunciation: KOH-moo eeyns-troo-TOHR jee ee-jee-OH-mahs, eh prah-SEE-zoo tayr MOOI-too pah-SYEHYN-syah.
back: As a language instructor, it is necessary to have a lot of patience.
context: Discussing soft skills required for teaching roles using 'instrutor de idiomas'.

front: Ela prepara os planos de aula durante o fim de semana.
pronunciation: EH-lah prah-PAH-rah oz PLAH-noos jee OW-lah doo-RAHN-chee oo feeyng jee seh-MAH-nah.
back: She prepares the lesson plans during the weekend.
context: Describing curriculum logistics using the specific term 'plano de aula'.

front: O foco das aulas particulares é sempre a conversação.
pronunciation: oo FOH-koo dahs OW-lahs pahr-chee-koo-LAH-rees eh SAYMP-ree ah kohn-vehr-sah-SOHNG.
back: The focus of private lessons is always conversation.
context: Stating pedagogical goals using 'aulas particulares' (private lessons).

front: Muitos estudantes estrangeiros querem aprender o sotaque brasileiro.
pronunciation: MOOI-toos ees-too-DAHN-chees ees-trahng-ZHAY-roos KEH-rehyng ah-prehn-DEHR oo soo-TAH-kee brah-zee-LAY-roo.
back: Many foreign students want to learn the Brazilian accent.
context: Discussing pronunciation goals using 'estudantes estrangeiros' and 'sotaque'.

front: Ela ensina regras gramaticais de forma simples e prática.
pronunciation: EH-lah eeyn-SEE-nah HEH-grahs grah-mah-chee-KAYS jee FOHR-mah SEEYMP-lees ee PRAH-chee-kah.
back: She teaches grammatical rules in a simple and practical way.
context: Describing educational delivery styles via 'regras gramaticais'.

front: O horário de trabalho dela é bastante flexível.
pronunciation: oo oo-RAH-ryoo jee trah-BAH-lyoo DEH-lah eh bahs-TAHN-chee flehk-SEE-vew.
back: Her work schedule is quite flexible.
context: Discussing freelance or remote timeline layouts using 'horário de trabalho'.

front: Como funciona o sistema de avaliações dos alunos?
pronunciation: KOH-moo foon-syo-NAH oo sees-TEH-mah jee ah-vah-ly-ah-SOHNGS dooz ah-LOO-noos?
back: How does the student review/evaluation system work?
context: Querying student feedback structures using 'avaliações'.

front: Eu ajudei a configurar o perfil dela na plataforma.
pronunciation: ew ah-zhoo-DAY ah kohn-fee-goo-RAHR oo pehr-FEEL DEH-lah nah plah-tah-FOHR-mah.
back: I helped set up her profile on the platform.
context: Assisting with digital profile configurations using 'configurar o perfil'.

front: Ela usa materiais autênticos como músicas e notícias.
pronunciation: EH-lah OO-zah mah-teh-ree-AYS ow-TEHYN-chee-koos KOH-moo MOO-zee-kahs ee noo-CHEE-syahs.
back: She uses authentic materials such as songs and news items.
context: Discussing immersive pedagogy tools via 'materiais autênticos'.

front: O aluno cancelou a aula em cima da hora hoje.
pronunciation: oo ah-LOO-noo kahn-seh-LOY ah OW-lah ahyng SEE-mah dah OH-rah OH-zhee.
back: The student canceled the class at the last minute today.
context: Using the popular Brazilian idiom 'em cima da hora' for last-minute events.

front: Quantas horas de aula ela costuma dar por semana?
pronunciation: KWAHN-tahs OH-rahs jee OW-lah EH-lah koos-TOO-mah dahr poor seh-MAH-nah?
back: How many class hours does she usually give per week?
context: Inquiring about instructional workloads using 'dar aula'.

front: Eu acho que ensinar a própria língua nativa é gratificante.
pronunciation: ew AH-shoo kee eehn-see-NAHR ah PROH-pree-ah LEENG-gwah nah-CHEE-vah eh grah-chee-fee-KAHN-chee.
back: I think that teaching one's own native language is rewarding.
context: Reflecting on pedagogical value using 'língua nativa'.

front: A conexão de vídeo precisa estar perfeita durante a chamada.
pronunciation: ah kohn-ehk-SOHNG jee VEE-jee-oo prah-SEE-zoo ees-TAHR pehr-FAY-tah doo-RAHN-chee ah shah-MAH-dah.
back: The video connection needs to be perfect during the call.
context: Stating technical needs for online tutoring loops ('chamada').

front: Os alunos avançados preferem discutir temas complexos.
pronunciation: ooz ah-LOO-noos ah-vahn-SAH-doos preh-FEH-reeyng dees-koo-CHEER TEY-mahs kohm-PLEHKS-oos.
back: Advanced students prefer to discuss complex themes.
context: Classifying student cohorts using 'alunos avançados'.

front: Ela costuma enviar uma lista de exercícios após a aula.
pronunciation: EH-lah koos-TOO-mah eehn-vy-AHR OO-mah LEES-tah jee eh-zehr-SEE-syoos ah-POHZ ah OW-lah.
back: She usually sends an exercise list after the class.
context: Describing post-session assignments via 'lista de exercícios'.

front: A maioria dos estudantes dela vem da Europa ou da América.
pronunciation: ah mah-yo-REE-ah doos ees-too-DAHN-chees DEH-lah vayyng dah ew-ROH-pah ow dah ah-MEH-ree-kah.
back: The majority of her students come from Europe or America.
context: Describing regional demographics using 'maioria dos estudantes'.

front: É importante criar um ambiente acolhedor, mesmo sendo virtual.
pronunciation: eh eeym-pohr-TAHN-chee kry-AHR oong ahym-by-EHN-chee ah-koo-lye-DOHR, MEYS-moo SEHN-doo veer-too-AW.
back: It is important to create a welcoming environment, even if it is virtual.
context: Stating emotional safety parameters in online coaching setups.

front: Como ela lida com alunos totalmente iniciantes?
pronunciation: KOH-moo EH-lah LEE-dah koong ah-LOO-noos toh-taw-MEHN-chee ee-nee-sy-AHN-chees?
back: How does she deal with absolute beginner students?
context: Querying foundational scaffolding methods for 'totalmente iniciantes'.

front: A plataforma desconta uma porcentagem do valor da hora.
pronunciation: ah plah-tah-FOHR-mah dees-COHN-tah OO-mah pohr-sehyng-TAHzhehyng doo vah-LOHR dah OH-rah.
back: The platform deducts a percentage of the hourly rate.
context: Discussing structural fee splits via 'desconta uma porcentagem'.

front: Ela recebeu ótimos comentários dos novos alunos esta semana.
pronunciation: EH-lah heh-seh-BEW OH-chee-moos coo-meehn-TAH-ryoos doos NOH-vahs ah-LOO-noos EHS-tah seh-MAH-nah.
back: She received great comments from the new students this week.
context: Tracking instructor rating successes via 'ótimos comentários'.

front: Ela prefere focar no ensino do português moderno.
pronunciation: EH-lah preh-FEH-ree foo-KAHR noo eeyn-SEE-noo doo poor-too-GHEHS moo-DEHR-noo.
back: She prefers to focus on teaching modern Portuguese.
context: Specifying pedagogical language variants using 'ensino do português'.

front: O microfone com redução de ruído melhora a qualidade da aula.
pronunciation: oo mee-kroo-FOH-nee koong heh-doo-SOHNG jee hoo-EE-doo meh-lyo-RAHR ah kwah-lee-DAH-jee dah OW-lah.
back: The microphone with noise reduction improves the class quality.
context: Optimizing hardware accessories for clear remote delivery.

front: Os alunos usam um link direto para agendar as aulas.
pronunciation: ooz ah-LOO-noos OO-zahyng oong leeyng-kee jee-REH-too PAH-rah ah-zhehn-DAHR ahs OW-lahs.
back: Students use a direct link to schedule the classes.
context: Describing calendar booking systems via 'agendar as aulas'.

front: Ela gosta de sugerir filmes brasileiros para os alunos assistirem.
pronunciation: EH-lah GOHS-tah jee soo-zheh-REER FEER-mees brah-zee-LAY-roos PAH-rah ooz ah-LOO-noos ah-sees-CHEE-rehyng.
back: She likes to suggest Brazilian movies for the students to watch.
context: Recommending external pop culture objects. 'Assistirem' is an inflected infinitive.

front: A flexibilidade do ensino remoto atrai muitas pessoas.
pronunciation: ah flehk-see-bee-lee-DAH-jee doo eeyn-SEE-noo heh-MOH-too ah-TRY MOOI-toah peh-SOH-ahs.
back: The flexibility of remote teaching attracts many people.
context: Praising distance learning market dynamics via 'ensino remoto'.

front: Eu ajudo ela com a parte técnica sempre que necessário.
pronunciation: ew ah-ZHOO-doo EH-lah koong ah PAHR-chee TEHK-nee-kah SAYMP-ree kee neh-seh-SAH-ryoo.
back: I help her with the technical part whenever necessary.
context: Describing a partner technical support workflow role using 'sempre que necessário'.

front: Ela cria planilhas personalizadas para acompanhar a evolução.
pronunciation: EH-lah KRY-ah plah-NEEL-yahs pehr-soo-nah-lee-ZAH-dahs PAH-rah ah-coohm-pah-NYAHR ah ee-voo-loo-SOHNG.
back: She creates customized spreadsheets to track progress/evolution.
context: Tracking long-term student data growth metrics via 'acompanhar a evolução'.

front: Alguns alunos querem aprender termos específicos de negócios.
pronunciation: aw-GOONGZ ah-LOO-noos KEH-rehyng ah-prehn-DEHR TEHR-moos ees-peh-SEE-fee-koos jee neh-GOH-syoos.
back: Some students want to learn specific business terms.
context: Focusing on Business Portuguese targeting tracks ('termos de negócios').

front: Ela incentiva os alunos a praticarem um pouco todo dia.
pronunciation: EH-lah eeyn-sehyng-CHEE-vah ooz ah-LOO-noos ah prah-chee-KAH-rehyng oong POH-koo TOH-doo JEE-ah.
back: She encourages students to practice a little bit every day.
context: Promoting persistent habits; triggers the inflected personal infinitive 'praticarem'.

front: O fuso horário pode ser um desafio para agendar aulas.
pronunciation: oo FOO-zoo oo-RAH-ryoo POH-jee sayr oong jeh-zah-FEE-oo PAH-rah ah-zhehn-DAHR OW-lahs.
back: The time zone can be a challenge for scheduling classes.
context: Managing geographical timeline variations using 'fuso horário'.

front: Ela se sente muito orgulhosa quando um aluno fica fluente.
pronunciation: EH-lah see SEHYN-chee MOOI-too oohr-gool-YOH-zah KWAHN-doo oong ah-LOO-noo FEE-kah floo-EHN-chee.
back: She feels very proud when a student becomes fluent.
context: Celebrating pedagogical outcome metrics using 'fica fluente'.

front: Muitas pessoas procuram aulas antes de viajar para o Brasil.
pronunciation: MOOI-tahs peh-SOH-ahs proo-KOO-rahyng OW-lahs AHN-chees jee vy-ah-ZHAHR PAH-rah oo brah-ZEEW.
back: Many people look for lessons before traveling to Brazil.
context: Targeting high-intent travel market cohorts before a journey ('antes de viajar').

front: Ela organiza o material didático em pastas compartilhadas.
pronunciation: EH-lah oohr-gah-NEE-zah oo mah-teh-ree-AW jee-DAH-chee-koo ahyng PAHS-tahs coohm-pahr-chee-LYA-dahs.
back: She organizes the teaching material in shared folders.
context: Managing digital assets securely using 'pastas compartilhadas'.

front: O segredo do sucesso online é manter a constância.
pronunciation: oo seh-GREH-doo doo soo-SEHS-oo online eh mahn-TEHR ah cohns-TAHN-syah.
back: The secret to online success is maintaining consistency.
context: Highlighting regular discipline markers within structural online workflows.
